title: PSV seal Eredivisie title after Feyenoord draw in Volendam
title_zh: 费耶诺德战平福伦丹后埃因霍温锁定荷甲冠军
description: PSV Eindhoven have been confirmed as Eredivisie champions for the third successive season after nearest rivals Feyenoord dropped points at...
description_zh: 埃因霍温PSV已确认连续第三个赛季夺得荷甲联赛冠军，最接近的竞争对手费耶诺德在比赛中丢分……

title: Barbecues ignite van fire in Haaren
title_zh: 哈伦烧烤引发货车火灾
description: A van fire broke out on Aan het Eind in Haaren at 1:45 p.m.
description_zh: 下午 1:45 哈伦的 Aan het Eind 发生一辆货车火灾

title: Three injured in Amsterdam stabbing after tourists intervene in street fight
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹街头斗殴中发生持刀伤人事件，三人受伤，起因是游客介入。
description: Three people were injured in a stabbing on Kloveniersburgwal in central Amsterdam after they stepped in to break up a dispute between a man and a woman, police said Sunday.
description_zh: 警方周日表示，在阿姆斯特丹市中心的克洛文尼尔斯堡瓦尔街，三人因上前劝架一对男女之间的争执而被刺伤。

title: Video: PSV title sparks massive street party in Eindhoven as fans flood city center
title_zh: 视频：PSV埃因霍温夺冠引发埃因霍温球迷大规模街头庆祝，球迷涌入市中心
description: PSV’s 27th Dutch league title set off large-scale celebrations Sunday in Eindhoven, where fans packed Stratumseind and the city center after the championship was confirmed, filling streets with red
description_zh: 埃因霍温PSV队第27次夺得荷甲联赛冠军，周日引发了埃因霍温的大规模庆祝活动。冠军确认后，球迷们涌入斯特拉图姆塞因德和市中心，街道上到处都是红色的庆祝旗帜。

title: A2 closure near Vianen sparks second day of traffic chaos as drivers ignore detours
title_zh: A2公路维亚嫩附近路段封闭，引发第二天交通混乱，司机无视绕行路线。
description: Traffic congestion has returned for a second consecutive day around Vianen, Utrecht, as a closure on the A2 motorway and an earlier crash on the A27 combine to disrupt regional travel and send driv
description_zh: 由于A2高速公路封闭以及此前A27高速公路发生的一起交通事故，乌得勒支省维亚嫩附近地区连续第二天出现交通拥堵，导致区域交通中断，车辆行驶受阻。

title: Dutch Customs seize over 1,400 kilograms of cocaine in Rotterdam Port
title_zh: 荷兰海关在鹿特丹港查获超过1400公斤可卡因
description: The Dutch Customs Service discovered more than 1,400 kilograms of cocaine during a large-scale inspection on Saturday in the Port of Rotterdam, seizing drugs in multiple containers that arrived on
description_zh: 荷兰海关周六在鹿特丹港进行大规模检查时，查获了超过1400公斤的可卡因，这些毒品藏匿在多个抵达的集装箱中。

title: PSV clinches historic Eredivisie title as Feyenoord draw at Volendam
title_zh: 费耶诺德战平福伦丹，埃因霍温历史性夺得荷甲冠军
description: PSV were crowned champions of the Eredivisie on Sunday after Feyenoord failed to beat FC Volendam.
description_zh: 周日，费耶诺德未能战胜沃伦丹足球俱乐部，埃因霍温因此加冕荷甲联赛冠军。

title: Pope Leo XIV breaks tradition of acknowledging the Netherlands in first Easter address
title_zh: 教宗利奥十四世在首次复活节致辞中打破传统，未向荷兰致辞。
description: Pope Leo XIV broke with long-standing Vatican tradition Sunday, omitting any reference to the Netherlands during his first Easter address and failing to acknowledge the country’s annual flower cont
description_zh: 教宗利奥十四世周日打破了梵蒂冈的长期传统，在他发表的首个复活节致辞中只字未提荷兰，也没有提及该国一年一度的花卉节。

title: Overcrowding eases at Ter Apel asylum center for first time in months
title_zh: 特尔阿佩尔难民营的拥挤状况数月来首次缓解。
description: Overcrowding at the asylum registration center in Ter Apel has eased for the first time in months, while a temporary shelter in Biddinghuizen has closed as planned, NU.nl
description_zh: 据 NU.nl 报道，特尔阿佩尔的难民登记中心人满为患的情况数月来首次有所缓解，而比丁赫伊曾的临时收容所已按计划关闭。

title: About 1 in 10 Dutch drivers consider switching to electric cars due to rising fuel costs
title_zh: 由于燃油成本上涨，大约十分之一的荷兰司机正在考虑改用电动汽车。
description: About 1 in 10 car owners in the Netherlands say they are considering switching to an electric vehicle due to rising fuel costs, according to a representative
description_zh: 据一位代表称，荷兰约有十分之一的汽车车主表示，由于燃油成本上涨，他们正在考虑改用电动汽车。

title: Will car-free Sundays come back? Two-thirds support the idea
title_zh: 无车星期天会回归吗？三分之二的人支持这一想法。
description: There is growing support for more action to reduce the use of fossil fuels because of soaring prices and looming...
description_zh: 由于化石燃料价格飙升和迫在眉睫的危机，越来越多的人支持采取更多行动来减少化石燃料的使用……

title: Nearly half of mothers would struggle financially under parental leave pay cuts
title_zh: 育儿假工资削减将使近一半的母亲面临经济困难。
description: Nearly half of working mothers would face financial hardship if they took additional parental leave, according to a Dutch labor union study, as political debate intensifies over
description_zh: 荷兰工会的一项研究显示，近一半的职业母亲如果休更长的育儿假，将面临经济困难。与此同时，关于育儿假的政治辩论也愈演愈烈。

title: More people with dementia are requesting euthanasia in NL
title_zh: 纽芬兰省越来越多的痴呆症患者申请安乐死
description: The number of people opting to end their lives through euthanasia because they are suffering from dementia has tripled since...
description_zh: 自……以来，因患有痴呆症而选择安乐死结束生命的人数增加了两倍。

title: “A borrel in the sun is one the random positive moments in life”
title_zh: “在阳光下喝一杯啤酒是生活中难得的美好瞬间之一。”
description: Audrey Tolbert moved to the Netherlands nine years ago to be with a Dutchman. Audrey, who works in game development,...
description_zh: 奥黛丽·托尔伯特九年前搬到荷兰，与一位荷兰男子在一起。奥黛丽从事游戏开发工作……

title: Euthanasia for patients with dementia nearly triples since 2020
title_zh: 自2020年以来，对患有痴呆症的患者实施安乐死的数量几乎增加了两倍。
description: Euthanasia among people with dementia in the Netherlands has nearly tripled since 2020.
description_zh: 自 2020 年以来，荷兰患有痴呆症的人接受安乐死的案例几乎增加了两倍。

title: Non-emergency police line sees sharp rise in wait times, call abandonment
title_zh: 非紧急报警热线等待时间急剧增加，弃号率上升
description: The accessibility of the Netherlands’ non-emergency police phone line 0900-8844 has significantly deteriorated recently, with worsening wait times and a history of similar disruptions raising conce
description_zh: 荷兰非紧急报警电话热线0900-8844的可用性近期显著下降，等待时间不断延长，且此前也曾发生过类似中断事件，引发了人们的担忧。

title: Dutch Easter weather to swing from rainy Sunday to sunny, milder Monday
title_zh: 荷兰复活节天气将由周日的雨天转为周一的晴天，气温将有所回升。
description: Easter in the Netherlands will differ sharply across the holiday weekend, with showers and a cool wind on Sunday, followed by a sunnier and milder Monday, weeronline
description_zh: 荷兰的复活节假期周末天气变化很大，周日有阵雨和凉风，周一则阳光明媚，气温回升。（weeronline）

title: Amsterdam stabbing suspect denied sentence reduction, now missing after court ruling
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹持刀伤人案嫌犯被拒绝减刑，法庭裁决后其下落不明
description: A court ruled that an 18-year-old man without legal residency status, who stabbed a victim outside a café and committed a wallet theft in 2024, will not receive a reduced sentence despite claims of
description_zh: 法院裁定，一名18岁、没有合法居留身份的男子，尽管有人声称可以减轻刑罚，但该男子不会获得减刑。该男子于2024年在一家咖啡馆外刺伤了一名受害者并抢走了一个钱包。

title: AI cuts MRI scan time from 23 to 9 minutes at Amsterdam cancer center
title_zh: 人工智能将阿姆斯特丹癌症中心的核磁共振扫描时间从23分钟缩短至9分钟
description: MRI scan times at the Antoni van Leeuwenhoek Hospital in Amsterdam have been reduced from 23 minutes to 9 minutes after the introduction of new artificial intelligence software, RTL
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹安东尼·范·列文虎克医院引入新的人工智能软件RTL后，核磁共振扫描时间已从23分钟缩短至9分钟。

title: House fire in Heerhugowaard triggers evacuations, NL Alert over heavy smoke
title_zh: 荷兰希尔胡戈瓦德一处民宅发生火灾，引发人员疏散；荷兰发布浓烟警报
description: A house fire early Sunday morning in Heerhugowaard prompted evacuations and a public safety alert due to heavy smoke, authorities said.
description_zh: 当局称，周日清晨，希尔胡戈瓦德一处房屋发生火灾，浓烟导致人员疏散并发布了公共安全警报。

title: Video: Wrong-way driver causes crash with 4 cars on A67 near Venlo
title_zh: 视频：逆行司机在芬洛附近的A67公路上引发四车相撞事故
description: A wrong-way driver caused a crash involving four other cars on the A67 near Venlo on Saturday afternoon, injuring the themselves and forcing a temporary highway closure, authorities said.
description_zh: 当局称，周六下午，一名逆行司机在芬洛附近的 A67 公路上引发了一起涉及四辆其他车辆的连环相撞事故，造成司机受伤，并迫使该公路暂时封闭。

title: Possible Viking ship fragment unearthed in Wijk bij Duurstede
title_zh: 在杜尔斯泰德韦克出土的可能是维京船碎片
description: A 53-year-old amateur archaeologist made what officials first described as a possible Viking ship discovery during sewer excavation work in Wijk bij Duurstede, but experts now say the find is uncer
description_zh: 一位53岁的业余考古学家在杜尔斯泰德附近的维克镇进行下水道挖掘工作时，发现了一艘疑似维京船的残骸，官员最初称之为维京船的发现，但专家现在表示，这一发现尚不确定。

title: Dutch households cut gas use by 14% since 2022 energy crisis
title_zh: 自2022年能源危机以来，荷兰家庭天然气使用量减少了14%。
description: Dutch households are continuing to use significantly less natural gas than before the 2022 energy crisis, while renewed tensions involving the Iran war are sharply increasing demand for heat pumps
description_zh: 荷兰家庭天然气使用量持续大幅低于2022年能源危机之前，而伊朗战争引发的紧张局势再度加剧，导致对热泵的需求急剧上升。

title: Twente beat Ajax in Amsterdam to climb above them in table
title_zh: 特温特在阿姆斯特丹击败阿贾克斯，排名超越对手。
description: Ajax’s poor season took another disappointing turn on Saturday evening as the Amsterdammers lost 2-1 at home to FC Twente.
description_zh: 阿贾克斯本赛季糟糕的战绩在周六晚上又添一笔令人失望的变故，阿姆斯特丹人在主场以 1-2 负于特温特足球俱乐部。

title: Dutch government sets aside 3.9 billion euros for offshore wind farm near IJmuiden Ver
title_zh: 荷兰政府拨款39亿欧元用于在艾默伊登附近建设海上风电场
description: The Dutch government has set aside 3.9 billion euros for a new offshore wind farm in the North Sea, Climate Minister Stientje van Veldhoven (D66) said.
description_zh: 荷兰气候部长斯蒂恩杰·范·费尔德霍芬（D66党）表示，荷兰政府已拨款39亿欧元用于在北海建设一座新的海上风电场。

title: PSV on brink of title after dramatic 4-3 win over Utrecht
title_zh: 在与乌得勒支的比赛中以4-3戏剧性地获胜后，埃因霍温距离冠军仅一步之遥。
description: PSV opened the door for the confirmation of their 27th Eredivisie title this weekend with a 4-3 win over FC Utrecht on Saturday.
description_zh: 埃因霍温周六以 4-3 战胜乌得勒支足球俱乐部，为本周末锁定第 27 个荷甲冠军打开了大门。

title: Three minors arrested after filmed assault in Bovenkarspel playground
title_zh: 三名未成年人因在博文卡斯佩尔游乐场发生的袭击事件被拍摄下来而被捕
description: Three minor boys were arrested after a filmed assault in a playground in Bovenkarspel, Noord-Holland, where a victim was forced to his knees and made to apologize before being beaten.
description_zh: 在荷兰北荷兰省博文卡斯佩尔的一个游乐场，三名未成年男孩因一起被拍摄下来的袭击事件而被捕。视频显示，一名受害者被迫跪下并道歉，然后遭到殴打。

title: KNMI issues code yellow for strong wind gusts across Noord-Holland, northern Netherlands
title_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）针对荷兰北部北荷兰省的强风发布黄色预警。
description: The Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute (KNMI)issueda code yellow warning for Noord-Holland, Friesland, the Wadde
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所 (KNMI) 向北荷兰省、弗里斯兰省、瓦德省发布黄色预警

title: Dutch cities warn Senate against making illegal residence a crime
title_zh: 荷兰各城市警告参议院，不要将非法居住定为犯罪。
description: The municipalities of Amsterdam, Eindhoven, Groningen, and Utrecht are urging the Dutch Senate to vote against making illegal residence
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹、埃因霍温、格罗宁根和乌得勒支等市政府敦促荷兰参议院投票反对将非法居留合法化。

title: Dutch prosecutors probe alleged antisemitic remarks at pro-Palestinian Amsterdam protest
title_zh: 荷兰检方调查阿姆斯特丹亲巴勒斯坦抗议活动中涉嫌发表反犹言论一事
description: Authorities in Amsterdam are investigating whether statements made during a pro-Palestinian demonstration on the Dam on Thursday amounts to antisemitism, while separately reviewing the circumstance
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹当局正在调查周四在水坝举行的亲巴勒斯坦示威活动中发表的言论是否构成反犹太主义，同时也在单独审查相关情况。

title: Trash fire in Nijmegen spreads to nearby apartment building, forces evacuations
title_zh: 奈梅亨垃圾场火灾蔓延至附近公寓楼，迫使居民疏散。
description: A fire that began in two trash containers behind Priemstraat in Nijmegen early Saturday morning spread to a nearby building containing five apartments, forcing the evacuation of guests and promptin
description_zh: 周六清晨，奈梅亨普里姆街后方两个垃圾箱起火，火势蔓延至附近一栋包含五套公寓的建筑，迫使住户疏散，并引发了火灾。

title: Explosion at Israeli Center in Nijkerk draws condemnation from Mayor, officials
title_zh: 尼凯尔克以色列中心发生爆炸，市长和官员予以谴责。
description: The mayor of Nijkerk and nearby residents expressed concern and solidarity after an
description_zh: 奈克尔克市长和附近居民在……之后表达了关切和团结。

title: Wolf attacks on livestock drop in Netherlands after years of steady increase
title_zh: 荷兰狼袭击牲畜事件在多年持续增加后有所下降
description: Reports of wolf attacks on livestock in the Netherlands fell in the first quarter of this year for the first time in years, to 255 cases, down from 385 in the same period last year, according to da
description_zh: 据荷兰通讯社（da）报道，今年第一季度荷兰狼袭击牲畜的报告数量多年来首次下降，降至255起，低于去年同期的385起。

title: Man arrested after violent home invasions, Sint-Michielsgestel attacks on woman and dog
title_zh: 男子因暴力入室抢劫被捕，圣米歇尔斯赫斯特尔一名女子和一条狗遭到袭击。
description: On Tuesday afternoon, police arrested a 28-year-old man after a series of violent incidents in Sint-Michielsgestel in which he entered multiple homes, assaulted a woman and her dog, choked a woman,
description_zh: 周二下午，警方逮捕了一名28岁男子，此前他在圣米歇尔斯赫斯特尔犯下了一系列暴力事件，包括闯入多户民宅、殴打一名妇女和她的狗、掐住一名妇女的脖子。

title: Dutch travelers shift toward familiar European destinations amid Iran war
title_zh: 伊朗战争期间，荷兰游客转向熟悉的欧洲目的地
description: Dutch consumers are booking summer and May holidays more cautiously following the Iran war, with travel patterns shifting sharply toward familiar European destinations while long-haul and Asian tra
description_zh: 受伊朗战争影响，荷兰消费者在预订夏季和五月假期时更加谨慎，旅行模式急剧转向熟悉的欧洲目的地，而长途和亚洲旅行则大幅减少。

title: Diesel prices climb again in Netherlands, hover near record highs
title_zh: 荷兰柴油价格再次攀升，接近历史高位。
description: Diesel prices in the Netherlands rose again on Saturday, following a sharp surge the day before, while petrol prices remained unchanged, according to consumer group UnitedConsumers.
description_zh: 据消费者团体 UnitedConsumers 称，继前一天大幅上涨之后，荷兰柴油价格周六再次上涨，而汽油价格保持不变。

title: Police investigate harassment reports in Nieuw-Vennep where a woman, 59, was found dead
title_zh: 警方正在调查尼乌-芬内普（Nieuw-Vennep）的骚扰案件，一名59岁女子被发现死亡。
description: Police are investigating multiple reports of women being harassed near a train station in Nieuw-Vennep on the same day a 59-year-old woman
description_zh: 警方正在调查多起女性在尼乌-芬内普火车站附近遭到骚扰的报案，其中一名59岁女性也于同一天遇害。

title: Police fire shot during Vlissingen arrest; Suspect hospitalized, police dog injured
title_zh: 弗利辛根警方逮捕嫌犯时开枪；嫌犯入院治疗，警犬受伤
description: Dutch police fired a shot during an arrest in Vlissingen on Friday evening after responding to a man showing disturbed behavior, leaving the suspect hospitalized and a police dog injured, RTL
description_zh: 荷兰警方周五晚间在弗利辛根逮捕一名行为异常的男子时开枪，导致嫌疑人入院治疗，一条警犬受伤。RTL电视台报道。

title: Explosion hits Israel Center in Nijkerk following series of attacks on Jewish sites
title_zh: 在发生一系列针对犹太场所的袭击后，尼凯尔克的以色列中心发生爆炸。
description: An explosion struck an Israeli center in Nijkerk late Friday night, policereported.No one was injured.
description_zh: 警方报告称，周五深夜，以色列尼凯尔克一处中心发生爆炸。无人受伤。

title: Two arrested in corruption case involving military police data leaks
title_zh: 两人因涉嫌泄露宪兵数据腐败案被捕
description: Two men were arrested in Spijkenisse in a corruption investigation involving the leaking and sale of sensitive information from the Koninklijke Marechaussee, the Netherlands’ military police, autho
description_zh: 两名男子在斯派克尼瑟被捕，他们涉嫌泄露和出售荷兰皇家宪兵队（Koninklijke Marechaussee）的敏感信息，这是一起腐败调查的一部分。

title: Airlines warn flight cuts could start in six weeks over fuel shortages
title_zh: 航空公司警告称，由于燃油短缺，航班削减可能在六周后开始。
description: Airlines are warning that flight cancellations could begin in six weeks if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed.
description_zh: 航空公司警告称，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，航班取消可能在六周后开始。

title: First week after clocks change brings higher accident risk, study finds
title_zh: 研究发现，时钟调整后的第一周事故风险较高。
description: More traffic accidents occur during the first week after the clocks have changed to summer time, according to a new study.
description_zh: 一项新的研究表明，夏令时开始后的第一周内，交通事故发生率较高。

title: Prices of housing construction plots increased 13.6% in 2025
title_zh: 2025年住房建设用地价格上涨13.6%。
description: The prices of new-build plots rose by an average of 15.3 percent in the fourth quarter compared to a year earlier, according to data from Statistics Netherlands.
description_zh: 根据荷兰统计局的数据，第四季度新建地块的价格比上年同期平均上涨了 15.3%。

title: New Apple Museum opens in Utrecht with backing from tech retailer behind Amac chain
title_zh: 一家新的苹果博物馆在乌得勒支开幕，该博物馆由Amac连锁店背后的科技零售商提供支持。
description: The Wall shopping center in Utrecht welcomed an Apple Museum on Thursday.
description_zh: 周四，乌得勒支的The Wall购物中心迎来了一家苹果博物馆。

title: Dutch care home deaths rarely reach court
title_zh: 荷兰养老院死亡案件很少诉诸法庭。
description: Fatal incidents in Dutch care institutions rarely result in criminal prosecution, even in serious cases in Eindhoven involving Lunet Zorg and GGzE, according to an
description_zh: 据一项调查显示，荷兰养老机构发生的致命事故很少导致刑事诉讼，即使是在埃因霍温涉及 Lunet Zorg 和 GGzE 的严重案件中也是如此。

title: April the only month that has never had a code orange or code red weather warning
title_zh: 四月是唯一一个从未发布过橙色或红色天气预警的月份
description: April remains the only month in the Netherlands that has never triggered a code orange or red weather warning, the KNMI
description_zh: 据荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）报道，四月仍然是荷兰唯一一个从未发布过橙色或红色天气预警的月份。

title: Aruba court convicts cops of fatally shooting 19-year-old
title_zh: 阿鲁巴法院判定警察枪杀19岁青年罪名成立
description: A court sentenced two police officers to three years in prison, including one year conditionally suspended, with a one-year probation on Thursday afternoon in Aruba, for the fatal shooting of 19-ye
description_zh: 周四下午，阿鲁巴一家法院判处两名警官三年监禁，其中一年缓刑，缓刑期间需接受一年监管，罪名是枪杀一名19岁青年。

title: Dutch cities struggle with illegal trash dumping as cleanup costs climb
title_zh: 随着清理成本攀升，荷兰城市正努力应对非法倾倒垃圾的问题。
description: Municipalities across the Netherlands are facing persistent problems with illegal waste dumping near container sites, with trash bags, large cardboard boxes, and discarded furniture frequently left
description_zh: 荷兰各地市政当局都面临着集装箱堆场附近非法倾倒垃圾的持续性问题，垃圾袋、大型纸箱和废弃家具经常被随意丢弃。

title: KLM CEO pay rises 32% amid cost-cutting measures and job cuts
title_zh: 在削减成本和裁员措施实施期间，荷航首席执行官薪酬上涨32%。
description: KLM CEO Marjan Rintel’s pay rose by almost 32 percent last year, at the same time as the airline implemented cost-saving measures to boost profitability.
description_zh: 去年，荷航首席执行官马里扬·林特尔的薪酬上涨了近 32%，与此同时，该航空公司实施了节约成本的措施以提高盈利能力。

title: Fugitive convicted of helping father kidnap Amsterdam girl Insiya caught in Latvia
title_zh: 因协助其父亲绑架阿姆斯特丹女孩因西娅而被定罪的逃犯在拉脱维亚落网
description: Erik S., previously convicted for his involvement in the abduction of 2-year-old Insiya Hemani, was arrested last week in Riga, Latvia, following a request from Dutch authorities.
description_zh: 埃里克·S. 曾因参与绑架 2 岁女童因西娅·赫马尼而被定罪，上周应荷兰当局的要求在拉脱维亚里加被捕。

title: Nieuw-Vennep woman, 59, was likely murdered at random; Bank employee didn't know suspect
title_zh: 一名来自纽文内普的59岁女子很可能是随机被谋杀的；银行职员并不认识嫌疑人。
description: The man suspected of murdering a 59-year-old woman in Nieuw-Vennep likely did not know the victim.
description_zh: 涉嫌在尼乌-芬内普谋杀一名 59 岁妇女的男子很可能并不认识受害者。

title: Paaspop bans broadcaster over video saying music festival hasn't sold out
title_zh: Paaspop因一段视频封禁了该广播公司，该视频称音乐节门票尚未售罄。
description: Omroep Brabant has been barred from reporting on this weekend’s Paaspop festival in Schijndel, a festival spokesperson confirmed.
description_zh: 音乐节发言人证实，奥姆罗普·布拉班特 (Omroep Brabant) 已被禁止报道本周末在斯海德尔举办的 Paaspop 音乐节。

title: Hague cop arrested for leaking police info, bribery, stealing uniforms
title_zh: 海牙一名警察因泄露警务信息、受贿和偷窃制服被捕
description: A Hague police officer was arrested this week on suspicion of “unlawfully accessing police systems, sharing police information with third parties, misappropriating police uniforms, and of
description_zh: 本周，一名海牙警官因涉嫌“非法入侵警务系统、与第三方共享警务信息、挪用警服等”而被捕。

title: Rotterdam suspect faces 20 years, compulsory psychiatric treatment for triple murder
title_zh: 鹿特丹嫌犯因三起谋杀案面临20年监禁和强制精神治疗。
description: The Public Prosecution Service (OM) has recommended a 20-year prison term and compulsory psychiatric treatment at a TBS facility for 25-year-old Sendric S., accused of three murders in Rotterdam’s
description_zh: 公共检察署 (OM) 建议判处 20 年监禁，并强制其在 TBS 机构接受精神治疗。25 岁的 Sendric S. 被控在鹿特丹犯下三起谋杀案。

title: At least 3 footballers allowed to play for Dutch clubs after figuring out passport woes
title_zh: 至少有3名足球运动员在解决护照问题后获准为荷兰俱乐部效力。
description: At least three footballers can play for Dutch professional football clubs again after figuring out their passport woes.
description_zh: 至少有三名足球运动员在解决护照问题后，可以再次为荷兰职业足球俱乐部效力。

title: Wrong number: fraudster calls crime show featuring phone fraud
title_zh: 打错电话：诈骗犯拨打电话诈骗犯罪节目
description: Fraudsters intent on carrying out a bank scam inadvertently ended up talking to the presenter of Dutch crime show. The...
description_zh: 一群意图实施银行诈骗的骗子，却阴差阳错地与荷兰犯罪节目的主持人聊了起来。

title: Dutch Russian tit-for-tat over journalists ends in bans
title_zh: 荷俄两国因记者问题展开针锋相对的报复，最终以禁令告终。
description: The Russian foreign ministry has banned Dutch journalist Geert Groot Koerkamp from working in Russia in retaliation for the expulsion...
description_zh: 俄罗斯外交部已禁止荷兰记者吉尔特·格鲁特·科尔坎普在俄罗斯工作，以报复其被驱逐出境一事……

title: Chocs away: Netherlands biggest exporter of cocoa products
title_zh: 巧克力走起：荷兰最大的可可产品出口商
description: The Netherlands has taken Germany’s crown as the biggest exporter of cocoa products in the world, according to the latest...
description_zh: 根据最新数据，荷兰已取代德国成为世界上最大的可可产品出口国……

title: A win-win: language schools embracing AI to their advantage
title_zh: 双赢：语言学校拥抱人工智能，从中获益
description: With some 130 million monthly users, the language-learning app Duolingo alone shows people’s hunger to learn new languages. But group...
description_zh: 仅语言学习应用 Duolingo 就拥有约 1.3 亿月活跃用户，这足以证明人们对学习新语言的渴望。但群体……

title: Dutch housing giant Vesteda extends deadlines to prevent large-scale home sales
title_zh: 荷兰房地产巨头Vesteda延长最后期限以防止大规模房屋销售
description: Investors in Vesteda have given the company some financial breathing room again after agreeing to a package of measures.
description_zh: 在投资者同意一系列措施后，Vesteda 的投资者再次给了该公司一些财务喘息空间。

title: Rising mortgage interest rates making homebuyers hesitate
title_zh: 不断上涨的抵押贷款利率令购房者犹豫不决
description: Homebuyers are hesitating now that mortgage interest rates are rising due to the war in the Middle East, De Hypotheker observed.
description_zh: De Hypotheker 观察到，由于中东战争导致抵押贷款利率上升，购房者现在犹豫不决。

title: Dutch housing update: AI, interest rates and do you buy or rent?
title_zh: 荷兰住房市场最新动态：人工智能、利率以及买房还是租房？
description: Interest rates are a very much a hot topic at the moment, but for savvy buyers the Dutch housing market...
description_zh: 利率目前是一个非常热门的话题，但对于精明的购房者来说，荷兰房地产市场……

title: Last Dutch journalist banned from working in Russia; Great loss, NVJ says
title_zh: 最后一位被禁止在俄罗斯工作的荷兰记者；荷兰记者协会称这是一大损失。
description: Russia has revoked the press accreditation of NOS correspondent Geert Groot Koerkamp, the broadcaster
description_zh: 俄罗斯撤销了NOS记者吉尔特·格鲁特·科尔坎普的记者证。

title: Ask about the foundations before you sign, owners lobby warns
title_zh: 业主游说团体警告：签约前务必询问地基情况
description: Homeowners’ association VEH is warning buyers that they could find themselves in financial problems because of new regulations covering property...
description_zh: 业主协会VEH警告购房者，由于新的房产法规，他们可能会面临财务困境……

title: Priciest ticket for FIFA World Cup final costs €9,500; Oranje's 1st match up to €2,600
title_zh: 世界杯决赛最贵的门票售价为9500欧元；荷兰队首场比赛的门票最高可达2600欧元。
description: Football fans will have to dig deep into their pockets if they want to physically go watch a match at the FIFA World Cup in Mexico, Canada, and the United States this year.
description_zh: 今年，如果足球迷们想亲临墨西哥、加拿大和美国观看国际足联世界杯的比赛，他们就得掏一大笔钱了。

title: Lack of electricity grid space threatens thousands of new homes
title_zh: 电网空间不足威胁着数千套新建住宅。
description: The lack of capacity on the Dutch electricity grid is threatening the construction of thousands of homes, developers, housing corporations...
description_zh: 荷兰电网容量不足正威胁着数千套房屋的建设，开发商、住房公司……

title: Parliamentary majority in sight for a ban on sharing footage of accident victims
title_zh: 议会有望获得多数支持，禁止分享事故受害者视频。
description: The Netherlands is one step closer to banning the sharing of photos and videos of accident victims.
description_zh: 荷兰距离禁止分享事故受害者的照片和视频又近了一步。

title: Gray skies, regular showers expected for most of Easter weekend; Sunshine on Monday
title_zh: 复活节周末大部分时间阴天，有阵雨；周一阳光明媚。
description: The long Easter weekend will be mostly gray with regular showers, except for Monday.
description_zh: 复活节长周末大部分时间将阴天，并伴有阵雨，周一除外。

title: Travel agencies starting to impose surcharge on package deals over high fuel prices
title_zh: 由于燃油价格高企，旅行社开始对旅游套餐加收附加费
description: Travelers who booked a package holiday can start to expect surcharges from their tour operator due to the Iran war driving up fuel prices.
description_zh: 由于伊朗战争导致燃油价格上涨，预订了旅游套餐的旅客可能会被旅行社收取附加费。

title: Inburgering with DN: how to celebrate Easter the Dutch way
title_zh: 荷兰式复活节：如何以荷兰方式庆祝复活节
description: Easter (Goede Vrijdag, 1e and 2e Paasdag) takes place this weekend, so it is time for catch-up session in the...
description_zh: 复活节（Goede Vrijdag，1e 和 2e Paasdag）就在本周末，所以是时候进行一些补习了……

title: Dutch will support Hormuz mission, when the fighting has stopped
title_zh: 荷兰将在战斗结束后支持霍尔木兹岛的军事行动。
description: The Netherlands is prepared to contribute militarily to reopening the Strait of Hormuz, but only within clear boundaries, foreign affairs...
description_zh: 荷兰准备在军事上为重新开放霍尔木兹海峡做出贡献，但前提是必须在明确的界限内，遵循外交政策……

title: Aruba hands over Nathalee Holloway disappearance case to Dutch authorities
title_zh: 阿鲁巴将娜塔莉·霍洛威失踪案移交给荷兰当局
description: Aruba’s Public Prosecution Service has handed over the Natalee Holloway disappearance case to the Dutch Public Prosecution Service (OM) in Amsterdam.
description_zh: 阿鲁巴公共检察署已将娜塔莉·霍洛威失踪案移交给阿姆斯特丹的荷兰公共检察署（OM）。

title: Cities halt sharing of passport photos with Employee Insurance Agency amid privacy probe
title_zh: 在隐私调查期间，各城市暂停与雇员保险机构共享护照照片。
description: The Netherlands’ three largest municipalities have stopped sharing passport photos of residents with the Employee Insurance Agency (UWV), while Amsterdam has reported a potential data breach, and t
description_zh: 荷兰三大城市已停止与荷兰雇员保险局 (UWV) 共享居民护照照片，而阿姆斯特丹则报告了一起潜在的数据泄露事件。

title: Schipol Airport-Zwolle night train impossible without municipal funding, Arriva says
title_zh: Arriva公司表示，如果没有市政资金，史基浦机场至兹沃勒的夜间列车将无法开通。
description: The Ariva night train running on Friday and Saturday nights from Schiphol to Zwolle and back is not profitable for the first part of the route, between the airport and Lelystad, according
description_zh: 据报道，Ariva夜间列车周五和周六晚上从史基浦机场开往兹沃勒并返回，但该线路第一段（机场至莱利斯塔德）并不盈利。

title: Students to get up to €2,000 compensation for education agency DUO's discrimination
title_zh: 学生将因教育机构DUO的歧视行为获得最高2000欧元的赔偿。
description: The Cabinet is going to pay compensation of between €500 and €2,000 to people who the education agency DUO discriminated against during checks in their student days, Education Minister Ri
description_zh: 教育部长里表示，内阁将向在学生时代因教育机构DUO的检查而受到歧视的人支付500至2000欧元的赔偿金。

title: Dutch extend ban on using steel slag in construction six months
title_zh: 荷兰将建筑业使用钢渣的禁令延长六个月
description: The temporary ban on the use of steel slag in construction projects is to be extended until January 2027, environment...
description_zh: 环境部门宣布，建筑工程中暂时禁止使用钢渣的禁令将延长至2027年1月。

title: Students who faced discrimination by Duo to get compensation
title_zh: 因 Duo 平台歧视而遭受损失的学生将获得赔偿
description: Former students who faced discriminatory checks by student finance company Duo between 2012 and 2023 are to be entitled to...
description_zh: 2012年至2023年间，曾遭受学生贷款公司Duo歧视性审核的前学生将有权获得……
